message:
feat(io,ufunc): use Arc<[u8]> for NpyArrayBytes payload and add masked_sort_order helper

Change NpyArrayBytes.payload from Vec<u8> to Arc<[u8]> to enable
zero-copy sharing of loaded .npy payloads across multiple consumers
without cloning the underlying byte buffer. This is particularly
beneficial when the same array data is referenced by multiple views
or broadcast operations.

Add masked_sort_order() comparator function for masked array sorting
that places unmasked values before masked ones, sorts unmasked values
by total_cmp (IEEE 754 total ordering including NaN), and breaks ties
among masked values by original index to preserve stability.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
